char_overview: A 写影师 who transcribes 灵力回路 onto physical media. Her archive maps 灵能者 weaknesses, serves the entire 帮会.
char_looks: Black hair combed tight and tucked behind ears, premature threads of gray. Thin, pale face. Pale brown eyes. Dark gray high-collared coat. None
char_flaws: Hoards transcriptions as personal property; Delays projects with obsessive verification.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-写影: Visualizes and transcribes a target 灵力回路 pattern onto tracing paper with 灵力-infused ink. Observation time varies with 灵力回路 complexity.
char_mission: Expand the 灵力回路 archive. Serve as 齿轮's information broker, for a price, any member can learn a rival's 灵力回路 before facing them in combat.

char_relationships.锻: Found him drinking alone in a 锈钟 bar weeks after he walked out of 狩灵协会3科. Recognized the quench burns before the name, a bladesmith the 狩灵协会 had thrown away, and brought him 月: someone who needed a blade, someone who needed a reason to light the furnace again. The first time she saw a transcription quenched into a blade, she realized what she drew did not have to point at anyone.
char_relationships.月: Brought him to 锻's forge. 月 had just become Second-in-command of 指针 and needed a blade worthy of the title; 锻 needed someone worth lighting the furnace for. 锻 had her transcribe 月's 灵力回路 that day, a pattern structure unlike anything she had recorded before.
char_relationships.世: The day 锻 forged 大典太 for 世, she was there transcribing 灵力回路. A woman in a cheongsam walked into the spotless forge without disturbing a single grain. She transcribed for three hours, handed over the pages, and said three words: "You are worth it."
char_relationships.狩灵协会4科: Former employer, left when a superior proposed using her 灵力回路 archive to analyze assassination targets. The officer who gave that order is still alive because 写乐 never copied his 灵力回路.
